tables.name: fda_510k_device_submission
tables.description: FDA 510(k) premarket notification submissions for medical devices. Each row represents a submission with detailed information about the device, its classification, intended use, and regulatory review. Contains 100 submissions.

columns.name: 510k_number
columns.description: Unique FDA 510(k) submission number assigned to the premarket notification. Type: TEXT. Format: 'K' followed by digits. Examples: 'K143467', 'K171742', 'K170491'.

columns.name: applicant
columns.description: Name of the company or organization that submitted the 510(k) application. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'TaiDoc Technology Corporation', 'Siemens Healthcare Diagnostics Products GmbH', 'Quidel Corporation'.

columns.name: classification
columns.description: FDA device classification level. Type: TEXT. Values include 'Class I' (lowest risk), 'Class II' (moderate risk), and combinations like 'II, II, I' for multi-component devices.

columns.name: conclusion
columns.description: FDA's conclusion on the submission, typically a substantial equivalence determination. Type: TEXT. Most common: 'The submitted information in this premarket notification is complete and supports a substantial equivalence decision.'

columns.name: indications_for_use
columns.description: Specific medical conditions, patient populations, and clinical scenarios for which the device is indicated. Type: TEXT. Contains detailed clinical indication text, often multi-paragraph.

columns.name: intended_use
columns.description: General intended use or purpose of the medical device. Type: TEXT. May reference 'Indications for Use' or contain a separate description. Examples: 'See Indications for Use below.', 'Same as Intended Uses'.

columns.name: measurand
columns.description: The biological substance, analyte, or parameter that the device measures or detects. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Capillary whole blood glucose from the fingertip, palm, forearm, and upper arm', 'Kappa (κ) Free Light Chain (FLC), Lambda (λ) Free Light Chain (FLC)', 'tcdA gene of toxigenic Clostridium difficile'.

columns.name: panel
columns.description: FDA review panel responsible for the device category, with panel number in parentheses. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Clinical Chemistry (75)', 'Immunology (82)', 'Microbiology (83)', 'Hematology (81)'. Format varies.

columns.name: predicate_510k_number
columns.description: 510(k) number(s) of the predicate device(s) used to demonstrate substantial equivalence. Type: TEXT. Format: 'K' followed by digits. May contain multiple numbers. Examples: 'k101509', 'K031016, K031016', 'K113358'.

columns.name: predicate_device_name
columns.description: Name(s) of the predicate device(s) to which substantial equivalence is claimed. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'FORA GD40 Blood Glucose Monitoring System', 'Portrait Toxigenic C. difficile Assay'.

columns.name: product_code
columns.description: FDA product code(s) that classify the device type. Type: TEXT. Three-letter codes, may contain multiple codes with descriptions. Examples: 'NBW, System, Test, Blood Glucose, Over the Counter', 'OZN', 'DFH, Kappa, antigen, antiserum, control'.

columns.name: proposed_labeling
columns.description: FDA assessment of the proposed device labeling. Type: TEXT. Most common: 'The labeling is sufficient and it satisfies the requirements of 21 CFR Part 809.10.' or similar.

columns.name: proprietary_and_established_names
columns.description: Proprietary (brand) and established (generic) names of the device. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'FORA GD43 Blood Glucose Monitoring System', 'Solana C. difficile Assay', 'N Latex FLC Kappa assay, N Latex FLC Lambda assay'.

columns.name: purpose_for_submission
columns.description: Reason for the 510(k) submission. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'New device', 'New device on two previously cleared instruments', 'To obtain a substantial equivalence determination for a new device', 'Clearance of New Device'.

columns.name: regulation_section
columns.description: Applicable FDA regulation section(s) under 21 CFR that the device falls under. Type: TEXT. Examples: '21 CFR 862.1345, Glucose test system', '21 CFR 866.3130, Clostridium difficile toxin gene amplification assay'.

columns.name: type_of_test
columns.description: Analytical or clinical test methodology used by the device. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Quantitative amperometric assay, glucose dehydrogenase (GDH-FAD)', 'Nephelometry, quantitative', 'Qualitative Helicase-Dependent Amplification (HDA) assay'.
